title: Personal service contracts
doc_html:
§1620.  Personal service contracts

Contracts for personal services may be awarded without the necessity of competitive bidding or competitive negotiation.

Added by Acts 1978, No. 772, §1; Acts 2014, No. 864, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
doc_text:
§1620.  Personal service contracts
Contracts for personal services may be awarded without the necessity of competitive bidding or competitive negotiation.
Added by Acts 1978, No. 772, §1; Acts 2014, No. 864, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
